violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The shelves in the dry storage shed are raw wood material.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Cutting board not being used being stored in a location that is continuously collecting food debris.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Fryer backside has collected lots of grease buildup overtime and needs cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Paper towels are being stored on a surface that is dusty, non smooth or easily cleanable. Paper cups in boxes being stored on the ground in cardboard.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls behind the fryer and vent hood have lots of buildup from oil and grease that needs cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor in the kitchen is missing tiles that needs replaced.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Cleaning, sanitizing or drying agents * were not adequately stored separate from poisonous, toxic materials or pesticides. Observed cleaning solutions and insecticides being stored together on a lower shelf near the grill. Worked with employee to correct this.
